title: Agents of the Four Seasons Reveals Episode 5 Preview
content: The preview of Agents of the Four Seasons Episode 5 has been revealed. The upcoming episode is slated to release on Saturday, April 25. Crunchyroll and Bilibili are streaming the series. Wit Studio is animating with Ken Yamamoto as director.
author: Anime Corner

title: The Case Files of Biblia Bookstore Anime by CloverWorks Reveals Teaser Visual, Trailer, 2027 Premiere
content: The Case Files of Biblia Bookstore TV anime revealed a teaser visual and trailer along with a 2027 premiere on Wednesday. CloverWorks is animating the series and the main staff and cast were also announced. Mamoru Kanbe is directing the anime with Ayako Kurata as assistant director.
author: Anime Corner

title: Godzilla Announces New Universe, “Godzilla World”
content: In North America, the MonsterVerse has become a juggernaut for Legendary Entertainment as the second season of Monarch: Legacy of Monsters roars on Apple TV. This fall, the King of the Monsters is planning to return with the highly anticipated sequel to Godzilla Minus One, Godzilla Minus Zero .
author: ComicBook

title: 2nd That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime Film's Trailer Previews Action
content: Crunchyroll unveiled a new trailer for That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Tears of the Azure Sea ( Gekijō-ban Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken: Sōkai no Namida-hen ), the second anime film in the That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime ( Tensei Shitara Slime Datta Ken ) franchise , on Wednesday.
author: ANN

title: Love Unseen Beneath the Clear Night Sky Anime's 2nd Video Reveals Musical Composer, Ending Song, July 6 Debut
content: The staff for the television anime of Nanigashi Shima and raemz 's Love Unseen Beneath the Clear Night Sky ( Tōmei na Yoru ni Kakeru Kimi to, Me ni Mienai Koi wo Shita ) novel revealed on Thursday the anime's second full promotional video and July 6 premiere.
author: ANN

title: Trapped in a Dating Sim Season 2 Reveals Key Visual and First Trailer, July 2026 Release
content: Trapped in a Dating Sim: The World of Otome is Tough for Mobs ( MobSeka ) Season 2 revealed the first trailer, along with a key visual and July 2026 release date. Studio ENGI is returning to animate, with Kazura Miura back as the sole director (he co-directed Season 1 with Shinichi Fukumoto).
author: Anime Corner

title: Trapped in a Dating Sim 2 Anime's 1st Promo Video Unveils July Debut
content: Kadokawa unveiled the first promotional video, first key visual (by character designer Masahiko Suzuki ), and July premiere for the second television anime season based on Yomu Mishima 's Trapped in a Dating Sim: The World of Otome Games is Tough for Mobs ( Otome Game Sekai wa Mob ni Kibishii Sekai Desu ) light novel…
author: ANN

title: Antiquarian Bookshop Biblia Mystery Novels Get TV Anime in 2027
content: Kadokawa announced on Wednesday that En Mikami 's Antiquarian Bookshop Biblia's Case Files ( Biblia Kosho-dō no Jiken Techō ) novel series is inspiring a television anime by CloverWorks that will premiere in 2027.
author: ANN

title: 'Biblia Koshodou no Jiken Techou' Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Teaser Promo for 2027 Premiere
content: Production company Aniplex opened an official website for the previously announced television anime adaptation of En Mikami 's Biblia Koshodou no Jiken Techou ( The Case Files of Biblia Bookstore ) novel on Wednesday, revealing the main cast, staff, a teaser visual (pictured), and teaser promotional video.
author: MyAnimeList

title: 8 Years Later, Major Crunchyroll Supernatural Anime Prepares For Finale With New Release
content: Crunchyroll is the largest streaming service for anime fans across the globe, and its library includes shows and films of all genres. One of the most acclaimed franchises in the platform is Rascal Does Not Dream series, which has released several seasons and films over the years.
author: ComicBook
